invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1950（基于ATR 41.4964和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.03%（显示多头拥挤），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 1950 (based on ATR 41.4964 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.03% (indicating long crowding).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破80（基于ATR 1.7627和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.02%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 80 (based on ATR 1.7627 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.02% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格突破0.102（基于ATR 0.0016和阻力位）或融资费率Z-score回落至正常水平（<50%），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks above 0.102 (based on ATR 0.0016 and resistance) or funding rate Z-score falls to normal levels (<50%).
